banner_message: This channel '{channel}' is owned by private equity.
details_description: This extension warns you about YouTube channels that are owned by private equity firms.
details_how_works_desc: The extension maintains a local blacklist of private equity-owned channels. When you visit a YouTube video or channel page, it checks the channel against this list and shows a warning if there's a match.
details_privacy_desc: All matching happens locally in your browser. No browsing data is sent to any server.
details_source_desc: The blacklist is updated from a public API. Updates are cached locally for performance.
